name: cursor-workflow-cannon
description: Thin client UI for Workflow Cannon — dashboard, tasks, and config via workspace-kit CLI.

workflowCannon.nodeExecutable.markdownDescription: Path to `node` for running workspace-kit. Leave empty to use `WORKSPACE_KIT_NODE`, Workflow Cannon's Node 22 runtime markers through nvm, common install paths, then `node` on `PATH`. The extension does not use the attached project's `.node-version` / `.nvmrc` unless you explicitly point this setting or `WORKSPACE_KIT_NODE` at that Node.

workflowCannon.kitRunDaemon.enabled.description: Reuse a warm workspace-kit run-daemon process for dashboard CLI calls instead of spawning a new Node child per command.

workflowCannon.taskStateSync.enabled.description: Run background git task-state sync (fetch/hydrate/apply) on an interval. Dashboard reads stay read-only.

workflowCannon.taskStateSync.intervalMin.description: Minutes between background task-state sync cycles (0 disables the interval; explicit refresh still works when enabled).

workflowCannon.taskStateSync.onGitHeadCh.description: When git HEAD changes (pull, merge, rebase, checkout), request background task-state sync immediately.

workflowCannon.dashboard.includeWishlist.description: Stop wishlist from adding dashboard cost by default. When enabled, dashboard loads and renders the wishlist.

workflowCannon.agentActivity.enabled.description: Record live agent activity leases for the Workflow Cannon dashboard (orchestrator + Cursor Task subagents).

workflowCannon.agentActivity.syncFromTra.description: Watch Cursor agent transcripts and mirror active Task subagents into kit agent activity.

workflowCannon.agentActivity.agentId.description: Agent id written on orchestrator activity leases.

workflowCannon.agentActivity.agentDefini.description: Agent definition id for the main Cursor chat on the dashboard.

workflowCannon.agentActivity.modelHint.description: Optional model slug for the orchestrator (e.g. composer-2.5). Task subagent models are inferred from transcripts when sync is enabled.

workflowCannon.agentActivity.thinkingLev.description: Optional thinking level label for the orchestrator when Cursor does not expose it.

workflowCannon.agentActivity.modelTier.description: Optional kit model tier for orchestrator sessions (cheap_fast, balanced, high_reasoning, …).

workflowCannon.agentActivity.hostHint.description: Host hint stored on activity leases.

workflowCannon.agentActivity.idlePulseSe.description: How often to refresh orchestrator/subagent activity leases while the extension is active.

workflowCannon.agentActivity.activeSubag.description: Treat a Task subagent transcript as active when its JSONL changed within this window.

commands.title: Workflow Cannon: Prefill Chat — Wishlist Intake Playbook
Workflow Cannon: Phase Notes Chat Guide
Workflow Cannon: Inspect Workspace Edit Lease
Workflow Cannon: Claim Workspace Edit Lease
Workflow Cannon: Release Workspace Edit Lease
Workflow Cannon: Recover Stale Workspace Edit Lease
Workflow Cannon: Use CLI Dashboard Refresh Mode

scripts.test: pnpm run compile && find test -name '*.test.mjs' -print0 | xargs -0 node --test
